sn35.62:1.1:
"Bhikkhus, I will teach you the Dhamma for the exhaustion of all clinging. Listen to that … "And what, bhikkhus, is the Dhamma for the exhaustion of all clinging?

2What do you think, bhikkhus, is the eye permanent or impermanent?"

… To be completed as in §32 … sn.iv.35
sn35.62:1.2: "This, bhikkhus, is the Dhamma for the exhaustion of all clinging."
